Package com.marswars.mechanisms

Class MechBase

java.lang.Object
com.marswars.mechanisms.MechBase
All Implemented Interfaces:
SubsystemIoBase
Direct Known Subclasses:
ArmMech, ElevatorMech, FlywheelMech, Module, RollerMech, SwerveMech
public abstract class MechBase extends Object implements SubsystemIoBase
Base class for mechanism IO implementations with common motor configuration helpers.

    class 
    MechBase.ConstructedMotors
    Container for constructed motor controllers and their status signals.

  • Constructor Details

    • MechBase

      public MechBase(String logging_prefix)
      Creates a new mechanism base
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - the logging prefix for this mechanism

    • MechBase

      public MechBase(String logging_prefix, String mech_name)
      Creates a new mechanism base with a specified mechanism name
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - the logging prefix for this mechanism
      mech_name - the name of the mechanism (used for mutliple instances of the same mech)

    • getLoggingKey

      public String getLoggingKey()
      Get the logging key for this mechanism.

      the logging key

    • getMechName

      public String getMechName()
      Get the name of the mechanism.
      Returns:
      the name of the mechanism

    • configMotors

      public MechBase.ConstructedMotors configMotors(List<FxMotorConfig> motor_configs, double sensor_to_mech_ratio, Function<FxMotorConfig,FxMotorConfig> configMaster)
      Configures the motors based on the given motor configs
      Parameters:
      motor_configs - the list of motor configs
      sensor_to_mech_ratio - the sensor to mechanism ratio
      configMaster - a function to modify the master motor config before applying it
      Returns:
      the constructed motors and their signals

    • configMotors

      public MechBase.ConstructedMotors configMotors(List<FxMotorConfig> motor_configs, double sensor_to_mech_ratio)
      Configures the motors based on the given motor configs
      Parameters:
      motor_configs - the list of motor configs
      sensor_to_mech_ratio - the sensor to mechanism ratio
      Returns:
      the constructed motors and their signals
